$comment: In-session TDD gate for the harness Python repo. tdd-guard reads the pytest reporter output (.claude/tdd-guard/data/test.json) and blocks implementing without a failing test / over-implementing. The protect-tdd-config self-guard denies edits to this gate config so an agent cannot silently remove it (a human edits it directly). Durable backstop lives in .github/workflows/harness-ci.yml.
